alerts.message: Signal Strength Floor Fault - Link degradation at -129.9 dBm (minimum: -110 dBm).
alerts.recommendedAction: Switch uplink transceiver from UHF to S-Band high-gain mode.

alerts.recommendedAction: Switch uplink transceiver from UHF to S-Band high-gain mode.

alerts.message: Low Battery Fault - Satellite is at 12.3% battery (threshold: 15%).
alerts.recommendedAction: Immediately send CMD_HTR_OFF or SAFE_MODE payload command to conserve remaining bus charge.

alerts.message: Low Power Warning - Critical battery level (12.0%) detected.
alerts.recommendedAction: Execute secondary radiator loop and load-shed non-essential science systems.

alerts.message: Intermittent Comms Handover Latency - Exceeding 1400ms delay.
alerts.recommendedAction: Reposition Ground Station Alpha transceiver pointing offset by +1.5 degrees.
